Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a query

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is changing a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is managing a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to manage a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} managed a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed a query of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
